inputs.focus: I need to add a new flowctl subcommand. Where do commands live and how are they tested?

expected_outputs.orientation_map: Entrypoints: tools/flowctl/flowctl/cli.py (build_parser adds subcommands). Tests: tests/test_flowctl.py. Build/test: pip install -e . then pytest. Ownership: schemas/ owns contracts, flows/ owns definitions. Risks: normalization and release-check both gate CI.

notes: Maps an unfamiliar repo with verified build and test commands before changes.
